conversation_memory.content: Hello there. It's great to hear from you. How are you feeling today? You seem a bit quiet, is everything okay? I'm here to listen and support you in any way I can. We don't have any new tasks to work on right now, so we can just focus on catching up and seeing how you're doing. Would you like to talk about what's on your mind?

Hello Anis, it's great to finally meet you. I'm here to listen and support you in any way I can. It takes a lot of courage to reach out and start a conversation about your mental health. I want you to know that you're not alone, and I'm here to help you work through any challenges you're facing. We can take things at your own pace, and I'll do my best to provide you with a safe and non-judgmental space to express yourself.

Before we begin, I just want to check in and see how you're feeling toda
